description_long: This is a large, two-story detached house with a complex roofline featuring multiple gables and dormers. The front facade includes a prominent central gable with a covered porch supported by columns, landscaped garden beds, and a paved driveway leading to a double garage. The exterior walls are finished in light-colored siding, and the roof is clad in a muted, shingle-like material. Windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, with a mix of single and grouped panes. The rear and side elevations are simpler, with fewer windows and a large expanse of lawn. The property is bordered by a sidewalk and driveway, with trees and shrubs providing additional curb appeal.
description: A spacious, two-story house with a gabled roof, covered porch, double garage, and landscaped front yard. Light siding, multiple windows, and a prominent entryway define its suburban character.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, covered porch, landscaped garden, and double garage.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, garage, and the depth of the house with visible rooflines.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a large, plain lawn area and minimal window openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side elevation, part of the porch, and the transition from driveway to lawn.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with grouped and single windows
attribute_entryway_design: Central covered porch with columns, steps, and a prominent front door flanked by landscaped beds
